creator: venefics@mbnet.fi
text:
MPlayer's joystick support works in FreeBSD with devel/linux-js, but it is disabled if not compiled in linux.

This patch adds config-option to enable joystick support (+add dependency to linux-js) and disables linux check for joystick.

Files affected on port:
Makefile
patch-configure (new file)
patch-input-joystick.c (new file)
